mechanism_narrative: A sustained decline in the federal funds rate signals an easing monetary cycle that compresses discount rates applied to equity cash flows, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in easing periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: Persistent disinflationary pressure, indicated by CPIAUCSL below 260, reduces central bank policy rate expectations, leading to positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 20d returns in 60%+ of instances where CPIAUCSL remains below 260.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous declines in FEDFUNDS and CPIAUCSL signal accommodative monetary policy and subdued inflation, creating favorable conditions for equity market gains over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX returns are negative in 50%+ of periods where both FEDFUNDS and CPIAUCSL meet the trigger conditions.

mechanism_narrative: Rising housing starts (HOUST > 1350) indicate strong consumer demand and construction activity, driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 60d returns in 50%+ of instances where HOUST exceeds 1350.

mechanism_narrative: Accelerating industrial production (INDPRO > 110) signals robust manufacturing activity, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX returns are negative in 60%+ of periods where INDPRO exceeds 110.

mechanism_narrative: Strong payroll growth (PAYEMS > 150,000) reflects a tightening labor market, pushing equity valuations higher through increased corporate earnings potential over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 20d returns in 50%+ of instances where PAYEMS exceeds 150,000.

mechanism_narrative: Concurrent declines in UNRATE and increases in PAYEMS signal a strong labor market, creating positive momentum in equity prices over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX returns are negative in 50%+ of periods where both UNRATE and PAYEMS meet the trigger conditions.

mechanism_narrative: Rising consumer spending (RSAFS > 525,000) indicates strong demand fundamentals, driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 60d returns in 50%+ of instances where RSAFS exceeds 525,000.
